This baseline model treats all crashes independently with a temporal trend.

```{r}
#| label: model1
#| cache: true

# Specify the model
model1 <- brm(
  fatalities | trials(aboard) ~ year_scaled,
  data = crashes,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 2), class = Intercept),
    prior(normal(0, 1), class = b)
  ),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  warmup = 1000,
  cores = 4,
  seed = 123,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  refresh = 0
)

# Model summary
summary(model1)
```

## Model 1 Visualization

```{r}
#| label: fig-model1-predictions-years
#| fig-cap: "Predicted fatality rates over calendar years"

# Create predictions with original years
year_range <- range(test_data$year)
new_data <- tibble(
  year = seq(year_range[1], year_range[2], by = 1),
  year_scaled = (year - mean(test_data$year)) / sd(test_data$year),
  aboard = 100
)

predictions <- add_epred_draws(new_data, model1) %>%
  mutate(fatality_rate = .epred / aboard)

ggplot(predictions, aes(x = year, y = fatality_rate)) +
  stat_lineribbon(.width = c(0.95, 0.80), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(data = test_data, 
             aes(y = fatality_rate), 
             alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Blues") +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Predicted Fatality Rate",
    fill = "Credible Interval",
    title = "Fatality Rate Trend Over Time"
  )
```

## Model 1 Diagnostics

```{r}
#| label: model1-diagnostics
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 6

# Posterior predictive check
pp_check(model1, ndraws = 100, type = "dens_overlay") +
  labs(title = "Posterior Predictive Check: Model 1")

# Trace plots for key parameters
mcmc_plot(model1, type = "trace", variable = c("b_Intercept", "b_year_scaled"))
```

## Model 1 Results

```{r}
#| label: model1-results
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5

# Extract posterior samples
posterior1 <- as_draws_df(model1)

# Plot coefficient estimates
posterior1 %>%
  select(b_Intercept, b_year_scaled) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "parameter", values_to = "value") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value, y = parameter)) +
  stat_halfeye() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Posterior Distributions: Model 1",
       x = "Parameter Value", y = "Parameter")

# Interpret the year effect on probability scale
cat("\nFatality Rate Predictions:\n")
cat("==========================\n")

# Calculate predicted rates for specific years
years_of_interest <- c(1950, 1970, 1990, 2000)
predictions_df <- data.frame()

for (yr in years_of_interest) {
  yr_scaled <- (yr - mean(crashes$year)) / sd(crashes$year)
  pred_rates <- plogis(posterior1$b_Intercept + posterior1$b_year_scaled * yr_scaled)
  
  cat(sprintf("\nYear %d:\n", yr))
  cat(sprintf("  Mean fatality rate: %.1f%%\n", 100 * mean(pred_rates)))
  cat(sprintf("  95%% CI: [%.1f%%, %.1f%%]\n", 
              100 * quantile(pred_rates, 0.025),
              100 * quantile(pred_rates, 0.975)))
}
```
